ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ISCHANGED(Stage_Status__c) && TEXT(Stage_Status__c) = 'Completed' && TEXT(Stage__c) = 'Demands & Progressive Collections' && ISPICKVAL(Funding_Type__c, 'Loan') && NOT(DD_Uploaded__c)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The Funding Type is Loan and there is a Pending Amount greater than zero. Please upload the DD (Demand Draft) as proof of loan commitment before marking stage as Completed.
